
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Wood Rooster|kanji=乙酉|romaji=kinoto tori|onyomi=otsuyu|p=yǐyǒu|w=i-yu|mi=i²¹ i̯ɤʊ̯²¹|y=jyut6 jau5|j=jyut6 jau5|ci=jyt̚ jɐu|mc=ʔit jɨu|oc-bs=Ɂik jɯʔ|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Wood Rooster also known as 乙酉''' (kino totori, otsuboku no tori, itsuyuu) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 22nd combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Boushoku|ja|1=Yang Fire Dog|2=ja|丙戌|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Boushoku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|lt=Yin Yang Five Elements|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|qid=Q822621|lt=Rooster (酉)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} represents yin {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): yǐyǒu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): jyut3 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Otsuboku-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: ikki
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): eul-yu (을유)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Ất Dậu

==Years of Yin Wood Rooster==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 25 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Wood Rooster (乙酉)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|25|en|25|qid=Q1166587|lt=25|1=25}}
* {{ill|85|en|85|qid=Q4644849|lt=85|1=85}}
* {{ill|145|en|145|qid=Q396429|lt=145|1=145}}
* {{ill|205|en|205|qid=Q29970|lt=205|1=205}}
* {{ill|265|en|265|qid=Q32189|lt=265|1=265}}
* {{ill|325|en|325|qid=Q32577|lt=325|1=325}}
* {{ill|385|en|385|qid=Q33689|lt=385|1=385}}
* {{ill|445|en|445|qid=Q33640|lt=445|1=445}}
* {{ill|505|en|505|qid=Q31072|lt=505|1=505}}
* {{ill|565|en|565|qid=Q33651|lt=565|1=565}}
* {{ill|625|en|625|qid=Q30089|lt=625|1=625}}
* {{ill|685|en|685|qid=Q33480|lt=685|1=685}}
* {{ill|745|en|745|qid=Q23612|lt=745|1=745}}
* {{ill|805|en|805|qid=Q30389|lt=805|1=805}}
* {{ill|865|en|865|qid=Q30350|lt=865|1=865}}
* {{ill|925|en|925|qid=Q24274|lt=925|1=925}}
* {{ill|985|en|985|qid=Q23414|lt=985|1=985}}
|
* {{ill|1045|en|1045|qid=Q19351|lt=1045|1=1045}}
* {{ill|1105|en|1105|qid=Q13719|lt=1105|1=1105}}
* {{ill|1165|en|1165|qid=Q19676|lt=1165|1=1165}}
* {{ill|1225|en|1225|qid=Q5403|lt=1225|1=1225}}
* {{ill|1285|en|1285|qid=Q5546|lt=1285|1=1285}}
* {{ill|1345|en|1345|qid=Q6077|lt=1345|1=1345}}
* {{ill|1405|en|1405|qid=Q6124|lt=1405|1=1405}}
* {{ill|1465|en|1465|qid=Q6556|lt=1465|1=1465}}
* {{ill|1525|en|1525|qid=Q6314|lt=1525|1=1525}}
* {{ill|1585|en|1585|qid=Q6736|lt=1585|1=1585}}
* {{ill|1645|en|1645|qid=Q6925|lt=1645|1=1645}}
* {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}}
* {{ill|1765|en|1765|qid=Q7665|lt=1765|1=1765}}
* {{ill|1825|en|1825|qid=Q6997|lt=1825|1=1825}}
* {{ill|1885|en|1885|qid=Q7821|lt=1885|1=1885}}
* {{ill|1945|en|1945|qid=Q5240|lt=1945|1=1945}}
|
* {{ill|2005|en|2005|qid=Q2019|lt=2005|1=2005}}
* {{ill|2065|en|2065|qid=Q890604|lt=2065|1=2065}}
* {{ill|2125|en|2125|qid=Q2104673|lt=2125|1=2125}}
* {{ill|2185|en|2185|qid=Q19826222|lt=2185|1=2185}}
* [[:en:2245|2245]]
* [[:en:2305|2305]]
* [[:en:2365|2365]]
* [[:en:2425|2425]]
* {{ill|2485|en|2485|qid=Q97234565|lt=2485|1=2485}}
* [[2545]]
* [[2605]]
* [[2665]]
* [[2725]]
* [[2785]]
* [[2845]]
* [[:en:2905|2905]]
* [[:en:2965|2965]]
|}

==Months of Yin Wood Rooster==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|August|en|August|qid=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} until the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|lt=Lesser Cold|1=Hanlu}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Wood Rooster==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Otsuyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsuyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.
==={{nihongo|selection days|選日|senjitsu|qq=}}===
乙酉の日 is the 2nd day of {{ill|Ten Ten Ichijou|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ten Ten Ichijou|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Wood Rooster|qq=ja|乙酉|version=104328711|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q185265|af|Houthaan (astrologie)|cdo|Ĭk-iū|de|Holz-Hahn|fr|Coq de bois|hak|Yet-yû|ja|乙酉|ko|을유|nds|Holt-Hahn|vi|Ất Dậu|za|Ietyoux|zh-min-nan|It-iú|zh-yue|乙酉|zh|乙酉|zh-min-nan|Īt-chú|cdo|Ék-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Hahnvi|de|Yin Wood Rooster|de|Holz-Hahneen|en|Wood Rooster|fr|Coq de boisboishak|it|Yit-chṳ́id|za|Yitceij|ar|Yin Wood Rooster}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
